title: Retrospective ingestion reliability
objective: Reliably harvest project retrospectives into reviewable candidates, enforce human promotion gates, restore one stable learning automation on repository entry or bootstrap, and publish the verified system and Profile updates.

tasks.title: Freeze ingestion and promotion contracts
tasks.acceptance: The registry schema, required fields, states, evidence rules, and promotion gates are explicit.

tasks.title: Implement robust retrospective harvesting
tasks.acceptance: Legacy, incomplete, changed, duplicate, and zero-state inputs produce deterministic read-only registry results.

tasks.title: Implement review and publication gates
tasks.acceptance: Single-source promotion is rejected unless source evidence includes an explicitly reviewed high-impact owner correction; publication is reviewed and idempotent.

tasks.title: Restore one learning automation from every system entry
tasks.acceptance: Repository AGENTS, install, and bootstrap converge on a stable automation id; ensure is idempotent and duplicate instances stop execution.

tasks.title: Verify tests and real source projects
tasks.acceptance: Automated tests and real read-only harvest of both Gongtu working copies and CanvasStorm pass without changing source Git state.

tasks.title: Publish system and Profile updates
tasks.acceptance: Both branches are committed, pushed, visible in their existing GitHub PRs, and the completion audit has direct evidence.
